testcase.name: test_get_services_by_pillar_care

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected list, got: <class 'dict'> assert False + where False = isinstance({'count': 13, 'services': [{'add_ons': [{'id': 'ADDON-HAIRCUT', 'name': 'Haircut/Trim', 'price': 300}, {'id': 'ADDON-TEETH', 'name': 'Teeth Brushing', 'price': 150}, {'id': 'ADDON-PERFUME', 'name': 'Pet Cologne', 'price': 100}, {'id': 'ADDON-DMAT', 'name': 'De-matting', 'price': 400}], 'available_cities': ['mumbai', 'bangalore', 'delhi', 'pune', 'hyderabad', 'chennai'], 'available_days': ['monday', 'tuesday', 'wednesday', 'thursday', 'friday', 'saturday'], 'available_time_slots': ['09:00', '10:00', '11:00', '12:00', '14:00', '15:00', ...], ...}, {'add_ons': [{'id': 'ADDON-FACIAL', 'name': 'Facial Treatment', 'price': 300}, {'id': 'ADDON-MASK', 'name': 'Coat Mask Treatment', 'price': 250}], 'base_price': 1500, 'category': 'grooming', 'city_pricing': {'bangalore': 1.0, 'delhi': 1.1, 'mumbai': 1.15}, ...}, {'add_ons': [{'id': 'ADDON-BLOOD', 'name': 'Blood Work', 'price': 1200}, {'id': 'ADDON-XRAY', 'name': 'X-Ray', 'price': 800}, {'id': 'ADDON-VAX', 'name': 'Vaccination', 'price': 500}], 'base_price': 600, 'category': 'vet', 'city_pricing': {'bangalore': 1.0, 'delhi': 1.15, 'mumbai': 1.2}, ...}, {'add_ons': [{'id': 'ADDON-BLOOD', 'name': 'Blood Work', 'price': 1200}, {'id': 'ADDON-XRAY', 'name': 'X-Ray', 'price': 800}, {'id': 'ADDON-VAX', 'name': 'Vaccination', 'price': 500}], 'base_price': 600, 'city_pricing': {'bangalore': 1.0, 'chennai': 0.95, 'delhi': 1.15, 'mumbai': 1.2}, 'created_at': '2026-02-01T00:58:23.818000', ...}, {'add_ons': [], 'base_price': 1500, 'city_pricing': {'bangalore': 1.0, 'delhi': 1.2, 'mumbai': 1.25}, 'created_at': '2026-02-01T00:58:23.818000', ...}, {'add_ons': [], 'base_price': 1200, 'city_pricing': {'bangalore': 1.0, 'delhi': 1.2, 'mumbai': 1.3}, 'created_at': '2026-02-01T00:58:23.818000', ...}, ...]}, list)

testcase.name: test_get_services_by_pillar_travel

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected list, got: <class 'dict'> assert False + where False = isinstance({'count': 7, 'services': [{'add_ons': [], 'base_price': 500, 'city_pricing': {}, 'created_at': '2026-02-01T00:58:23.818000', ...}, {'add_ons': [], 'base_price': 300, 'city_pricing': {}, 'created_at': '2026-02-01T00:58:23.818000', ...}, {'add_ons': [], 'base_price': 800, 'city_pricing': {}, 'created_at': '2026-02-01T00:58:23.818000', ...}, {'add_ons': [], 'base_price': 400, 'city_pricing': {}, 'created_at': '2026-02-01T00:58:23.818000', ...}, {'add_ons': [], 'base_price': 5000, 'city_pricing': {}, 'created_at': '2026-02-01T00:58:23.818000', ...}, {'add_ons': [], 'base_price': 15000, 'city_pricing': {}, 'created_at': '2026-02-01T00:58:23.818000', ...}, ...]}, list)

testcase.name: test_get_services_by_pillar_fit

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected list, got: <class 'dict'> assert False + where False = isinstance({'count': 8, 'services': [{'add_ons': [], 'base_price': 300, 'city_pricing': {'bangalore': 1.0, 'delhi': 1.1, 'mumbai': 1.15}, 'created_at': '2026-02-01T00:58:23.818000', ...}, {'add_ons': [], 'base_price': 6000, 'city_pricing': {'bangalore': 1.0, 'delhi': 1.1, 'mumbai': 1.15}, 'created_at': '2026-02-01T00:58:23.818000', ...}, {'add_ons': [], 'base_price': 1000, 'city_pricing': {}, 'created_at': '2026-02-01T00:58:23.818000', ...}, {'add_ons': [], 'base_price': 800, 'city_pricing': {}, 'created_at': '2026-02-01T00:58:23.818000', ...}, {'add_ons': [], 'base_price': 500, 'city_pricing': {}, 'created_at': '2026-02-01T00:58:23.818000', ...}, {'add_ons': [], 'base_price': 2500, 'city_pricing': {}, 'created_at': '2026-02-01T00:58:23.818000', ...}, ...]}, list)

testcase.failure: tests/test_pillar_kit_guard.py:162: in test_get_services_by_pillar_fit assert isinstance(data, list), f"Expected list, got: {type(data)}" E AssertionError: Expected list, got: <class 'dict'> E assert False E + where False = isinstance({'count': 8, 'services': [{'add_ons': [], 'base_price': 300, 'city_pricing': {'bangalore': 1.0, 'delhi': 1.1, 'mumbai': 1.15}, 'created_at': '2026-02-01T00:58:23.818000', ...}, {'add_ons': [], 'base_price': 6000, 'city_pricing': {'bangalore': 1.0, 'delhi': 1.1, 'mumbai': 1.15}, 'created_at': '2026-02-01T00:58:23.818000', ...}, {'add_ons': [], 'base_price': 1000, 'city_pricing': {}, 'created_at': '2026-02-01T00:58:23.818000', ...}, {'add_ons': [], 'base_price': 800, 'city_pricing': {}, 'created_at': '2026-02-01T00:58:23.818000', ...}, {'add_ons': [], 'base_price': 500, 'city_pricing': {}, 'created_at': '2026-02-01T00:58:23.818000', ...}, {'add_ons': [], 'base_price': 2500, 'city_pricing': {}, 'created_at': '2026-02-01T00:58:23.818000', ...}, ...]}, list)

testcase.name: test_get_all_services

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected list, got: <class 'dict'> assert False + where False = isinstance({'count': 50, 'services': [{'add_ons': [{'id': 'ADDON-HAIRCUT', 'name': 'Haircut/Trim', 'price': 300}, {'id': 'ADDON-TEETH', 'name': 'Teeth Brushing', 'price': 150}, {'id': 'ADDON-PERFUME', 'name': 'Pet Cologne', 'price': 100}, {'id': 'ADDON-DMAT', 'name': 'De-matting', 'price': 400}], 'available_cities': ['mumbai', 'bangalore', 'delhi', 'pune', 'hyderabad', 'chennai'], 'available_days': ['monday', 'tuesday', 'wednesday', 'thursday', 'friday', 'saturday'], 'available_time_slots': ['09:00', '10:00', '11:00', '12:00', '14:00', '15:00', ...], ...}, {'add_ons': [{'id': 'ADDON-FACIAL', 'name': 'Facial Treatment', 'price': 300}, {'id': 'ADDON-MASK', 'name': 'Coat Mask Treatment', 'price': 250}], 'base_price': 1500, 'category': 'grooming', 'city_pricing': {'bangalore': 1.0, 'delhi': 1.1, 'mumbai': 1.15}, ...}, {'add_ons': [{'id': 'ADDON-BLOOD', 'name': 'Blood Work', 'price': 1200}, {'id': 'ADDON-XRAY', 'name': 'X-Ray', 'price': 800}, {'id': 'ADDON-VAX', 'name': 'Vaccination', 'price': 500}], 'base_price': 600, 'category': 'vet', 'city_pricing': {'bangalore': 1.0, 'delhi': 1.15, 'mumbai': 1.2}, ...}, {'add_ons': [{'id': 'ADDON-CAKE-CUSTOM', 'name': 'Custom Cake Design', 'price': 1500}, {'id': 'ADDON-PHOTO', 'name': 'Professional Photoshoot', 'price': 2500}, {'id': 'ADDON-GUESTS', 'name': 'Extra Pet Guests (per pet)', 'price': 500}], 'base_price': 5000, 'city_pricing': {}, 'created_at': '2026-02-01T00:58:23.818000', ...}, {'add_ons': [], 'base_price': 8000, 'city_pricing': {}, 'created_at': '2026-02-01T00:58:23.818000', ...}, {'add_ons': [], 'base_price': 3000, 'city_pricing': {}, 'created_at': '2026-02-01T00:58:23.818000', ...}, ...]}, list)

testcase.failure: tests/test_pillar_kit_guard.py:176: in test_get_all_services assert isinstance(data, list), f"Expected list, got: {type(data)}" E AssertionError: Expected list, got: <class 'dict'> E assert False E + where False = isinstance({'count': 50, 'services': [{'add_ons': [{'id': 'ADDON-HAIRCUT', 'name': 'Haircut/Trim', 'price': 300}, {'id': 'ADDON-TEETH', 'name': 'Teeth Brushing', 'price': 150}, {'id': 'ADDON-PERFUME', 'name': 'Pet Cologne', 'price': 100}, {'id': 'ADDON-DMAT', 'name': 'De-matting', 'price': 400}], 'available_cities': ['mumbai', 'bangalore', 'delhi', 'pune', 'hyderabad', 'chennai'], 'available_days': ['monday', 'tuesday', 'wednesday', 'thursday', 'friday', 'saturday'], 'available_time_slots': ['09:00', '10:00', '11:00', '12:00', '14:00', '15:00', ...], ...}, {'add_ons': [{'id': 'ADDON-FACIAL', 'name': 'Facial Treatment', 'price': 300}, {'id': 'ADDON-MASK', 'name': 'Coat Mask Treatment', 'price': 250}], 'base_price': 1500, 'category': 'grooming', 'city_pricing': {'bangalore': 1.0, 'delhi': 1.1, 'mumbai': 1.15}, ...}, {'add_ons': [{'id': 'ADDON-BLOOD', 'name': 'Blood Work', 'price': 1200}, {'id': 'ADDON-XRAY', 'name': 'X-Ray', 'price': 800}, {'id': 'ADDON-VAX', 'name': 'Vaccination', 'price': 500}], 'base_price': 600, 'category': 'vet', 'city_pricing': {'bangalore': 1.0, 'delhi': 1.15, 'mumbai': 1.2}, ...}, {'add_ons': [{'id': 'ADDON-CAKE-CUSTOM', 'name': 'Custom Cake Design', 'price': 1500}, {'id': 'ADDON-PHOTO', 'name': 'Professional Photoshoot', 'price': 2500}, {'id': 'ADDON-GUESTS', 'name': 'Extra Pet Guests (per pet)', 'price': 500}], 'base_price': 5000, 'city_pricing': {}, 'created_at': '2026-02-01T00:58:23.818000', ...}, {'add_ons': [], 'base_price': 8000, 'city_pricing': {}, 'created_at': '2026-02-01T00:58:23.818000', ...}, {'add_ons': [], 'base_price': 3000, 'city_pricing': {}, 'created_at': '2026-02-01T00:58:23.818000', ...}, ...]}, list)
